features.inputCss: .card { @media (width >= 48rem) { color: blue; & .title { color: green; } } @supports (display: grid) { display: grid; } }
features.expectedOutputCss:
@media (min-width: 48rem) { .card { color: blue; } .card .title { color: green; } }
@supports (display: grid) { .card { display: grid; } }

@media (min-width: calc(48rem + 0.02px)) { .card { display: block; } }
@media (max-height: calc(40rem - 0.02px)) { .card { display: none; } }

features.inputCss:
@media (48rem < width <= 72rem) { .card { display: block; } }
@media (30rem <= height < 50rem) { .card { display: none; } }
features.expectedOutputCss:
@media (min-width: calc(48rem + 0.02px)) and (max-width: 72rem) { .card { display: block; } }
@media (min-height: 30rem) and (max-height: calc(50rem - 0.02px)) { .card { display: none; } }

features.inputCss: .logical { margin-inline-start: 1rem; padding-inline-end: 2rem; border-inline-start: 1px solid red; text-align: start; }
features.expectedOutputCss: .logical { margin-left: 1rem; margin-inline-start: 1rem; padding-right: 2rem; padding-inline-end: 2rem; border-left: 1px solid red; border-inline-start: 1px solid red; text-align: left; text-align: start; }
.button { -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none; -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; }

features.inputCss: .panel { display: inline-flex; hyphens: auto; text-size-adjust: 100%; mask-image: linear-gradient(black, transparent); }
.hero { place-items: center start; place-content: space-between center; place-self: stretch end; }
features.expectedOutputCss: .hero { align-items: center; justify-items: start; place-items: center start; align-content: space-between; justify-content: center; place-content: space-between center; align-self: stretch; justify-self: end; place-self: stretch end; }

.hero { background-image: -webkit-image-set(url("hero.avif") type("image/avif") 1x, url("hero.png") type("image/png") 1x); background-image: image-set(url("hero.avif") type("image/avif") 1x, url("hero.png") type("image/png") 1x); }
.card { color: #1d4ed8; color: var(--brand); padding-top: 1rem; padding-top: env(safe-area-inset-top, 1rem); }

features.inputCss:
:root { --brand: #1d4ed8; }
.card { color: var(--missing-fg, #111827); border: 1px solid var(--brand); padding: var(--space, calc(1rem + 2px)); }
features.expectedOutputCss: .card { color: #111827; color: var(--missing-fg, #111827); border: 1px solid #1d4ed8; border: 1px solid var(--brand); padding: calc(1rem + 2px); padding: var(--space, calc(1rem + 2px)); }
.button { background-image: linear-gradient(to right, red, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0)); background-image: linear-gradient(to right, red, transparent); }
.layout { display: -ms-grid; display: grid; -ms-grid-columns: 12rem 1fr; grid-template-columns: 12rem 1fr; -ms-grid-rows: auto 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto 1fr; }
.print { page-break-before: always; break-before: page; page-break-inside: avoid; break-inside: avoid; }

.flex { display: -webkit-box; display: -ms-flexbox; display: flex; }
.grid { display: grid; }

limitations: Official DX starter replacement score is 100 for the governed compatibility matrix.
This is still not full arbitrary PostCSS plugin parity.
Autoprefixer parity remains partial until broader equal-output target-browser tests prove generated CSS.
Grid legacy prefixing emits safe display/track canaries but remains partial until placement synthesis is implemented.
